title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, published on PyPI as 'ollama'.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, distributed on npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM and embeddings wrappers.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama models (now named 'Open WebUI').

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama with Kotlin extensions, published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenience CLI wrapper written in Go that adds interactive chat and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team: Generator, ChatGenerator and Embedder nodes.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C#/.NET SDK for Ollama, available on NuGet.

title: ollama-mistral
summary: Community repo documenting how to run quantized Mistral models with Ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Starter template for building RAG pipelines using Ollama embeddings and LangChain.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language client for Ollama with async HTTP and WebSocket support.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app that connects to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate for Ollama's REST API.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app providing a REST API and admin interface for Ollama models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete using local Ollama models.
